Title: Pass
Message:
**:tada: Congratulations! You passed your test calls! :tada:**
- 24-48hrs to go live. Watch your inbox.
- Log out of Call Corp and Simple Script.
- Complete TLMS courses.
- Remove extra mock shifts from Gateway.
**Welcome to ACDD!**

Title: Fail
Message: Unfortunately I can't pass you today. Please reschedule in Gateway within 24 hours.

Title: Fail Final
Message: Thank you for your time. Unfortunately you have exceeded the allowed Mock Call attempts. We wish you luck.

Title: Incomplete
Message:
Our time is up. We'll schedule another session for Supervisor Transfers.
Please give me a moment.

Title: Ncns
Message: Candidate was a No Call / No Show for mock testing.

Title: Sup Intro
Message: I'll help you complete the Supervisor Transfer test call. I'll provide instructions step by step. OK?

Title: Sup Instructions
Message:
When you need to transfer:
1) Ask in chat first
2) Give CCM time to check
3) When CCM says ok - let caller know you are transferring

Title: Sup Transfer
Message:
1. Click Transfer in CC
2. Select Queue > ACD Direct Supervisor
3. Tell caller to hold, click Blind Transfer

Title: Sup Transfer Now
Message: You may transfer the call now.

Title: Sup Stars
Message: WXYZ Supervisor Test Call Being Queued

Title: Sup Disposition
Message:
Click cancel (red phone), disposition as Test/Training.
Then disposition in Call Corp.

Title: Sup Retry
Message: Transfer was not successful. Review steps and let me know when ready.

Title: Ran Out Of Time
Message: We have run out of time for today's session. I will need to schedule you for a Newbie Shift to complete the Supervisor Transfer portion.
